title: BEM-739 fix dispatcher YAML
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tmp']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'
check=Path('scripts/check_claude_mailbox_active.py')
check.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nfrom pathlib import Path\np=Path("governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json")\nactive=False\ntry:\n    active=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")).get("active") is True\nexcept:\n    active=False\nPath("governance/tmp").mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nPath("governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_active.env").write_text("active="+("true" if active else "false")+"\\n",encoding="utf-8")\nprint("active="+("true" if active else "false"))\n''')
state_script=Path('scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py')
if not state_script.exists():
    state_script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nSTATE=Path("governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json")\nREPORT=Path("governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md")\nmode=sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "tick"\noutcome=sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else "unknown"\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\ntry:\n    data=json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) if STATE.exists() else {}\nexcept:\n    data={}\nruns=data.get("runs",[]) if isinstance(data.get("runs",[]),list) else []\nruns.append({"time":now,"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome})\nruns=runs[-100:]\nif mode=="start": data["started_at"]=now\nif mode=="complete":\n    data["completed_at"]=now\n    data["claude_action_outcome"]=outcome\ndata.update({"schema_version":"claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.v1","status":"runtime_"+mode,"latest":{"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome,"time":now},"runs":runs,"operator_role":"none"})\nSTATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nSTATE.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nREPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nREPORT.write_text("# Claude Inbound Mailbox Workflow State"+SEP+SEP+"Time: "+now+SEP+"Mode: "+mode+SEP+"Outcome: "+outcome+SEP+"Operator role: none"+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nprint(json.dumps({"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome,"time":now},ensure_ascii=False))\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Internal Auditor Dispatcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["Codex Runner"]
    types:
      - completed

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-internal-auditor:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check helper scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/check_claude_mailbox_active.py scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py
      - name: Check active mailbox work
        id: active_check
        run: |
          python3 scripts/check_claude_mailbox_active.py
          cat governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_active.env >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
      - name: Record dispatcher start
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true'
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py start dispatcher_start
      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true'
        id: claude_response
        continue-on-error: true
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Internal Auditor for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.
            Read the newest file in governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/.
            Write a concise response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with a filename containing the BEM id.
            Include explicit Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED when asked.
            If asked why no prior response existed, explain the runtime or trigger reason based on repository evidence.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
          claude_args: |
            --max-turns 8
      - name: Record dispatcher completion
        if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true' && always()
        env:
          CLAUDE_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.claude_response.outcome }}
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py complete "$CLAUDE_OUTCOME"
      - name: Commit dispatcher state
        if: always()
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_active.env || true
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-739 Claude dispatcher state"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'no_inline_python_marker','pass':'python3 - <<' not in text and '<<PY' not in text and "<<'PY'" not in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'helper_script_exists','pass':check.exists(),'evidence':str(check)},
 {'name':'workflow_run_bridge','pass':'workflow_run:' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'records_state','pass':'record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py' in text,'evidence':str(wf)}]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='dispatcher_yaml_fixed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'DISPATCHER_YAML_FIX_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'fix_claude_dispatcher_yaml_inline_python.v1','bem':'BEM-739','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem739_fix_claude_dispatcher_yaml_inline_python.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem739_fix_claude_dispatcher_yaml_inline_python.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-739 | Fix Claude Dispatcher YAML Inline Python | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Dispatcher workflow rewritten to use helper scripts instead of inline Python heredoc.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem739_fix_claude_dispatcher_yaml_inline_python','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem739_fix_claude_dispatcher_yaml_inline_python.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-739 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(check),str(state_script),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Fixed invalid Claude dispatcher workflow by moving inline Python logic into scripts and preserving workflow_run bridge')
"""
No issue comments.
